name: Professional TSCM Suite
description: Complete professional counter-surveillance system. Adds ultrasonic detection, EEG monitoring, GPS RTK, and external antenna arrays. What our original system runs.

alternatives.name: DIY Ultrasound Mic (MEMS mic + 192 kHz ADC)
alternatives.note: Build your own with an ICS-40720 MEMS mic and USB audio interface supporting 192kHz. Not as sensitive as M500 but works for strong signals.

petterson_m500.setup: USB plug-and-play. May need to kill zombie processes if already in use.

gps_rtk.note: Provides centimeter-level positioning for mobile triangulation. Requires RTK base station or NTRIP service for full accuracy.
gps_rtk.setup: Connect via USB (appears as COM port). Configure with u-center.

eeg.note: Detects EEG extraction attacks and SSVEP stimulation. TGAM is bare chip (soldering required). OpenBCI is turnkey.
eeg.setup: TGAM connects via Bluetooth COM port. OpenBCI has USB dongle. Requires electrodes.

external_antennas.note: Directional antennas dramatically improve bearing accuracy and range. Yagi for 2.4GHz MW detection. Log periodic for wideband. Ferrite loop for 450MHz DF.

detects: Ultrasound attacks (silent sound, eardrum capture, US modems)
Full forensic evidence chain with all sensor modalities
